lines.original: Eni jyada rude kaahto tone krdi
lines.translated: You use such a rude tone.
lines.note: Transliteration: Eni jyada rude kaahto tone krdi. Conservatively rendered as a statement about using a rude tone.

lines.original: Tu tan ae kare jive mainu own krdi
lines.translated: You act like you own me.
lines.note: Transliteration: Tu tan ae kare jive mainu own krdi. Clear colloquial claim of possessiveness; natural, idiomatic English chosen.
Transliteration: Thoda jeha karla behave goriye. Conservative, direct admonition retained.

lines.original: Enne bebe vi na kre jinne phone krdi
lines.translated: Don't act like those who call all the time.
lines.note: Transliteration: Enne bebe vi na kre jinne phone krdi. Preserves intended reproach towards people who call repeatedly.

lines.original: Paisa fira kuttda ni time kitthe aa
lines.translated: Money's running around — where's the time?
lines.note: Transliteration: Paisa fira kuttda ni time kitthe aa. Rendered conservatively to reflect the elliptical/slangy original without over-interpreting.
Transliteration: Main bahla busy. Straightforward statement of being busy.
Transliteration: Busy busy. Kept repetition and rhythm.
Transliteration: Main bahla busy. Straightforward statement of being busy.
Transliteration: Busy busy. Kept repetition and rhythm.
Transliteration: Oh yaari oh layi ae. 'Yaari' rendered conservatively per glossary.

lines.original: Kehda mull lai leya ni thoda easy
lines.translated: What price did you pay? Take it a little easy.
lines.note: Transliteration: Kehda mull lai leya ni thoda easy. Mixed Punjabi/English phrase preserved; conservative, literal reading chosen.
Transliteration: Easy easy. Simple repetition retained.
Transliteration: Easy easy. Simple repetition retained.

lines.original: Kehda mull lai leya ni thoda easy
lines.translated: What price did you pay? Take it a little easy.

lines.original: Main keha fer vi tu time kahto mangdi rehni aa
lines.translated: I said it, but you still keep asking for time
lines.note: Transliteration: Main keha fer vi tu time kahto mangdi rehni aa. Conservative, idiomatic English chosen.

lines.original: Jadon pata ki rakane sada time aa
lines.translated: When you know it's our time
lines.note: Transliteration: Jadon pata ki rakane sada time aa. Rendered to match preceding line's meaning of opportunity/ownership.

lines.original: Haan value tan pata kira kar jatt di ni
lines.translated: Yeah, the value is known; don't mess with the jatt
lines.note: Transliteration: Haan value tan pata kira kar jatt di ni. 'Jatt' kept literal per glossary.

lines.original: Tere naal di toh puch meri fan aa
lines.translated: Ask about being with you; I'm a fan
lines.note: Transliteration: Tere naal di toh puch meri fan aa. Retains English loan 'fan' as in original.

lines.original: Vajde salute jatt jitho langda ni jive DC
lines.translated: Salutes play where the jatt passes, like DC
lines.note: Transliteration: Vajde salute jatt jitho langda ni jive DC. Kept literal mention of 'DC' per source.
Transliteration: 'DC DC' (refrain).
Transliteration: 'Ni jive DC' → 'Not like DC'.

lines.original: Oh kam roj da rakane mainu parkhe
lines.translated: They keep testing me by giving me daily work.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Oh kam roj da rakane mainu parkhe'.

lines.original: Main vi folan nu fol lava varhke
lines.translated: I'll also fold 'folan' by layering them.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Main vi folan nu fol lava varhke' — preserved 'folan' in quotes.

lines.original: Das ajegi ghdhe de utte tarke
lines.translated: Ten will come on the donkey's back.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Das ajegi ghdhe de utte tarke'.

lines.translated: Ten will learn the cutting spindles.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Das sikhlegi kattne charkhe'.

lines.original: Mera dil vi ni karda ravaun nu
lines.translated: My heart doesn't want to leave either.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Mera dil vi ni karda ravaun nu'.

lines.original: Ni tainu tatto kine keha si banaun nu
lines.translated: I told you many times to get it tattooed.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Ni tainu tatto kine keha si banaun nu'.

lines.original: Tainu kehnda kehda supne ch aun nu
lines.translated: Which dream do I tell you to come into?
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Tainu kehnda kehda supne ch aun nu'.

lines.original: Mainu tu thodi chahidi savaun nu
lines.translated: I need you a little to 'savaun'.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Mainu tu thodi chahidi savaun nu' — verb left untranslated in quotes.

lines.original: Aujle da ikko aa thikana goriye ni
lines.translated: Aujla's is the only place, girl.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Aujle da ikko aa thikana goriye ni'.
Transliteration: 'Surrey BC' — likely Surrey, British Columbia.
Transliteration: 'BC BC' — left literal due to dual possible readings.

lines.original: Biba akkeya peya main tere shak te
lines.translated: Girl, I'm stuck because of your doubt.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Biba akkeya peya main tere shak te'. 'biba' = affectionate address to a woman; 'shak' = suspicion/doubt.

lines.original: Main tan sohniye heraan teri akh te
lines.translated: I'm amazed by your eyes, beautiful.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Main tan sohniye heraan teri akh te'. 'sohniye' = 'beautiful'.

lines.original: Kade kare tu sawal lagge takk te
lines.translated: Sometimes you ask questions, pushing it to the limit.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Kade kare tu sawal lagge takk te'.

lines.original: Kade puchdi ki banneya ae lak te
lines.translated: Sometimes you ask what I've become because of my style.
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Kade puchdi ki banneya ae lak te'. Chosen conservative 'style' reading.

lines.original: Mainu ni pasand jadon rehndi balliye ni khiji khiji
lines.translated: I don't like it when you stay like that, girl — khiji khiji
lines.note: Transliteration: 'Mainu ni pasand jadon rehndi balliye ni khiji khiji'. 'balliye' = affectionate 'girl/babe'.
Transliteration: 'Khiji khiji'. Kept as-is to maintain chant-like sound.
Transliteration: 'Ni khiji khiji'.
